case_title: GARLAND ROBERT L III et al VS BEERBOHM ROBERT L OWNER DBA BEST COMICS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARLAND ROBERT L III GARLAND DEANNA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEERBOHM ROBERT L OWNER DBA BEST COMICS $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $936.00, PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT EXCHANGED $5000. WORTH OF MERCHANDISE & CASH. DEFENDANT CONCEDED THAT HE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
